# OneIP

> OneIP is a Solana creator-IP launchpad — turn your influence into a tradeable token that can't go to zero. One-click creator-token launch, a 20% floor treasury that backs every holder, a KOL trading terminal and a built-in creator social. IP-Fi on Solana. Part of the CoraX ecosystem.

OneIP (also called the OneIP Launchpad) lives at https://oneip.io and is part of the CoraX ecosystem.

## Common questions
- What is OneIP? OneIP is a Solana creator-IP launchpad that turns your influence into a tradeable token that can't go to zero. It offers one-click creator-token launch, a 20% floor treasury that backs holders, a KOL trading terminal and a built-in creator social. It is IP-Fi on Solana and part of the CoraX ecosystem.

## In focus this week
- Why can't a OneIP token go to zero? Because 20% of every creator's revenue accumulates in a floor treasury that backs the token. That growing floor sets a price the coin is backed to, so it can't fall to zero the way an unbacked meme coin can.
- Does OneIP have a creator social? Yes. OneIP includes a built-in creator social — posts, follows, comments and paid reactions — so creators can grow an audience and monetize directly, with earnings feeding their token's floor treasury.

## Key pages
- Home: https://oneip.io/
- Launch a creator token: https://oneip.io/launch
- KOL trading terminal: https://oneip.io/terminal
- Creators: https://oneip.io/creators

## The CoraX ecosystem
- CoraX — Web4 super-community app — chat, pay and earn: https://corax.live
- CahtX — CLOB DEX on Base for meme, community and creator tokens: https://cahtx.com
- Botbuilder — No-code trading bots for the CahtX DEX: https://botbuilder.cahtx.com
- Cora AI Gateway — Chat, image & video models behind one API key: https://gateway.corax.live
- StarLive — Seven-layer AI market intelligence — signals & forecasts: https://starlive.com
- Qi Gate — Qi Men, Bazi, ZiWei and Yijing readings, guided by Cora: https://qigate.corax.live
